LAW AND MOTION, 302, DEFENDANT SAFEWAY, INC.'S JOINDER TO DEFENDANT GAS SECURE SOLUTIONS (USA) INC'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT - THE COURT OVERRULES DEFENDANT'S DILATORY DEMURRER. THE COURT LIBERALLY READS THE COMPLAINT PER CCP 452 AND READS THE COMPLAINT AS A WHOLE. THE PLEADING CLEARLY DESCRIBES FACTS REGARDING THE NATURE OF THE ATTACK AND EVEN PROVIDES THE NAME OF THE ASSAILANT. DEFENDANT'S ARGUMENTS ABOUT VICARIOUS LIABILITY AND/OR RATIFICATION RAISE FACTUAL ISSUES THAT CANNOT BE RESOLVED ON DEMURRER. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; REPORTER: MELANIE GHENO, CSR # 7489 (302/EHG)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-13-2015 Overruled
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT G4S SECURE SOLUTIONS (USA) INC.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT - The court overrules defendant's dilatory demurrer. The court liberally reads the complaint per CCP 452 and reads the complaint as a whole. The pleading clearly describes facts regarding the nature of the attack and even provides the name of the assailant. Defendant's arguments about vicarious liability and/or ratification raise factual issues that cannot be resolved on demurrer. Order signed. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR # 7489 =302/ehg
